chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appl. No.820 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA 10941/2024. 19.11.2024. Ms. Saira, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. = I have heard learned counsel for applicant, who has impugned order dated 08.08.2024 passed on an application u/s 22-A & B Cr.P.C. filed by respondent No.1 in which protection has been granted to respondent with direction to SHO to record his statement. Mr. Nasrullah Jalbani, advocate who has filed power on behalf of respondent No.1 today has submitted that FIR has already been registered and witnesses need protection as the applicant is trying to threaten them. Since the impugned order has already been implemented and FIR has been registered, no case for interference is made out. This application is dismissed. The parties are at liberty to approach the trial court for redressal of their grievances, if any. The Cr. Misc. Application stands disposed of. JUDGE A.K
